key.name: junk-filter
key.description: Hide books read for less than five minutes (plugin READMEs and the like) from the library list.

key.name: source-path
key.description: The file the current statistics snapshot was imported from; used by Refresh.

key.name: library-dir
key.description: Folder holding the books and their .sdr sidecars, read only for the user-declared finished status the stats database does not carry. Empty means the finished state is inferred from reading position alone.

key.name: theme
key.description: The selected palette id, or 'system' to follow the desktop light/dark preference.
